evidence_label: case-001 advanced-therapy screening owner packet gate, not medical advice

source_checks.source_role: Frames HCT as curative but dependent on donor route, iron and organ workup, conditioning, fertility assessment, follow-up, and thalassemia-expert transplant centers.
Frames gene addition and gene editing as reshaping curative options while preserving specialist selection, age, donor, access, and long-term evidence boundaries.
Regulator anchor for exagamglogene autotemcel in TDT patients 12 years and older; not local access or individual suitability.
Regulator anchor for betibeglogene autotemcel in beta-thalassemia requiring regular RBC transfusions; not local access or individual suitability.

source_checks.source_label: May 25 Asia curative gene-cell therapy registry refresh
source_checks.source_role: Benchmark geography and registry context only; cannot establish case eligibility, travel, import, access, or treatment choice.

owner_domains.missing_data_blocker: No advanced-therapy screening question should proceed without clinician-confirmed disease category and genotype context.
Reported regular transfusion must be converted into interval, units or volume, body weight, pre-transfusion Hb, response, and annual burden labels.
Antibody, DAT, matching, reaction, phenotype or genotype, and crossmatch context must be owner-labeled before transplant or gene-cell discussion.
Ferritin trend, LIC, cardiac T2*, chelation, toxicity monitoring, and organ-risk labels are still needed.
Infection, vaccination, fertility preservation, conditioning risk, and follow-up capacity belong to specialist review.
HLA or donor discussion must remain private and clinician-led; the public repo can only record safe labels.
Center availability, payer, affordability, and geography must be separated from biology and confirmed by owners.

decision_rule: Curative biology is real, but case-001 remains advanced-therapy-packet-missing until all seven owner domains are label-ready and a qualified specialist decides whether screening is reasonable.
